name: sonner-types
visual_summary: SonnerTypes is a utility component used to display and manage a list of types. It is typically used within a registry or catalog context to allow users to filter and explore different types. A developer would use this component when needing to showcase various types in a clear and organized manner.
generation_prompt:

Style: e.g. minimal, light
Interactions: e.g. static
